titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 726

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=964 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 11:41:10.553095+00 | translation moa=965 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 11:41:10.535672+00

p.cl: Vniuersis fidelibus Sancte ęcclesię Gauterius de lyndesey Salutem .

Nouerint tam futuri quam
presentes me dedisse et concessisse et hac mea carta confirmasse ęcclesię Sancte Marie de
Kelcho . et monachis ibidem deo seruientibus . ecclesiam de Ercheldune cum una carrucata
terrę et ceteris omnibus ad illam ecclesiam pertinentibus  in perpetuam elemosinam . pro anima
scilicet Regis dauid . et pro anima Henrici Comitis filii eius . et pro anima Gauterii awunculi
mei . et pro anima mea et vxoris meę . et pro animabus omnium predecessorum et successorum
meorum . Et hospitale in eadem villa quietum erit ab omni reditu decimarum . Con
cedente et testificante Willelmo filio meo .
Testibus . Hugone clerico . Willelmo . Capellano . Iohanne Capellano de Sprostune . Ricardo Sacerdote de bothelden . Roberto Scriptore
To all the faithful of Holy Church, Walter of Lindsay sends greeting.

Let those to come as well as those present know me to have given, granted, and by this my charter to have made firm, to the church of St Mary at Kelso, and to the monks serving God there, the church of Earlston with one ploughgate of land and all the rest belonging to it, in perpetual alms, for the soul of King David, and for the soul of Earl Henry his son, and for the soul of Walter my uncle, and for my own soul and for my wife's, and for the souls of all my ancestors and successors. And the hospital in the same toun shall be quit from all rent of teinds. William my son consents and witnesses.
As witnesses, Hugh the clerk, William the chaplain, John the chaplain of Sprouston, Richard the priest of Bowden, Robert the scribe.
